zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Kynaston於大約1499年出生在英國英格蘭史洛普爾時，他的父親Thomas Kynaston of Estwick30歲，母親Helen Kynaston21歲。他於大約1518年與Alice Harnage在英國英格蘭史洛普爾紹頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1549年之後。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Kynaston于大约1499年出生在英国英格兰史洛普爾时，他的父亲Thomas Kynaston of Estwick30岁，母亲Helen Kynaston21岁。他于大约1518年与Alice Harnage在英国英格兰史洛普爾紹頓结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1549年之后。

nameMeanings.name: Kynaston
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the three places called Kynaston: in Kinnerley (Shropshire), in Hentland (Herefordshire), or in Much Marcle (Herefordshire).

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Kynaston was born about 1499, in Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Thomas Kynaston of Estwick, was 30 and his mother, Helen Kynaston, was 21. He married Alice Harnage about 1518, in Shotton, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. He died after 1549.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Kynaston est né environ 1499, à Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Kynaston of Estwick, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Helen Kynaston, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Alice Harnage environ 1518, à Shotton, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé après 1549.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Kynaston um 1499 in Shropshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Kynaston of Estwick 30 und seine Mutter Helen Kynaston 21. Er hat um 1518 in Shotton, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom Alice Harnage geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb nach 1549.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Kynaston è nato il circa 1499 nel Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Thomas Kynaston of Estwick, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Helen Kynaston, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Alice Harnage circa 1518, nel Shotton, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì dopo il 1549.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Kynastonが約1499年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアで生まれた時，父Thomas Kynaston of Estwickは30歳，母Helen Kynastonは21歳であった。約1518年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアショットオンでAlice Harnageと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1549年以後に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Kynaston(이)가 대략 1499년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Kynaston of Estwick(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Helen Kynaston(은)는 21세였다. 그는 대략 1518년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 쇼턴에서 Alice Harnage(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1549년 이후 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Kynaston nasceu aproximadamente 1499, em Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas Kynaston of Estwick, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Helen Kynaston, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Harnage aproximadamente 1518, em Shotton, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu após 1549.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Kynaston родился около 1499 г. в местности шропшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Thomas Kynaston of Estwick было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Helen Kynaston, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Harnage около 1518 г. в местности шоттон, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер после 1549 г.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Kynaston nació aproximadamente 1499, en Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Thomas Kynaston of Estwick, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Helen Kynaston, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Alice Harnage aproximadamente 1518, en Shotton, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió después de 1549.
